● LIVE 10s

Welcome to the World

A title AI wrote for this Live

Swipe down to open this day ↓
Moment August 2024
🎙 What everyone's saying
▶I have someone for you to meet, baby ♡
▶You want to get cozy? You can hold her
▶Good job, Ezra — she loves it!
▶Hi, beautiful boy — Mommy missed you today
▶Who's that? Your best friend?
✍ The story of this day

Ezra reached out with both arms, and we all went quiet as we lowered her in. He'd been asking to hold her since morning. Somehow this tiny person settled against his chest like she already knew him, and his whole face changed — careful, proud, a little scared. "She loves it," someone whispered. The room was warm and bright and full of us. Four now. He didn't want to let go.

—— by Moment AI
Moment
Capturing every moment worth keeping
